title: crinum × sinicoscabrum
intro: Crinum × sinicoscabrum is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Crinum x powellii and Crinum scabrum, and is commonly known as the 'powellii lily' or 'hybrid powder lily'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Crinum × sinicoscabrum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Crinum × sinicoscabrum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, or ointments, and is often used in folk medicine in tropical regions.
